prompt: A warm, cinematic anime-style group illustration set in a cozy creative studio at night, showing 5 young adult characters gathered around a wooden table during an AI brainstorming session. The scene is viewed at table height in a natural candid composition, not everyone looking at the camera. In the foreground center, a short black-haired person in a black hoodie sits with their back partly toward the viewer, working on an open laptop whose screen shows a glowing blue futuristic AI interface with a circular "AI" emblem. On the left foreground, a silver-haired young man in a white high-collar jacket with pale blue trim sits in profile, facing toward the group. Mid-left, another silver-haired young man in a light jacket and white shirt sits thoughtfully with one hand near his chin. At the back center-right, a tall elegant silver-haired figure in flowing white layered robes leans forward over the table, guiding the discussion. On the right, a silver-blue-haired young woman with a side ponytail wears a white and blue hoodie and rests her cheek on one hand while using a tablet. Include exactly 2 visible laptops with glowing blue AI-themed dashboards, exactly 1 tablet in use on the right, exactly 1 white ceramic mug near the center, exactly 1 black takeaway cup with a blue heart icon near the front right, and exactly 1 small bowl of snack cubes on the far right edge of the table. In the background, show a glass board or wall on the left with hand-drawn Japanese brainstorming notes and diagrams, including "AI", "アイデア", "未来", and repeated "画像生成" written in marker. Add a leafy green houseplant behind the group and warm hanging lights or soft bokeh lighting in the studio. Use golden hour indoor lighting, rich amber highlights, soft shadows, highly polished anime illustration rendering, detailed hair strands, reflective screens, and a collaborative, intelligent, relaxed mood. Add an elegant cursive text overlay along the bottom reading "Mai, Luca, Koyo, Grace & Shun".
